subcodes.first_line: The Ocean of Inner Meanings hath desired to send unto thee a chalice from the Kawthar of utterance. When thou drinkest thereof, say: "Glorified art Thou!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اراد بحر المعانی ان یرسل الیک قدحا من کوثر البیان انک اذا شربت قل سبحانک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment
